EDTECH & AR 1st Place — HawkHack 2025

AR Anatomical Platform with Generative AI Contextual Explanations

3Ducate layers augmented reality over anatomical models with AI explanations on demand. Built in 24 hours at HawkHack 2025 and awarded first place.

Date

January 2025

Duration

24 hours

Team

4 members

Category

EDTECH & AR

PythonARComputer VisionGenerative AI
01 / 04

The Problem

Medical education relies on textbooks and 2D diagrams. Students struggle to understand 3D anatomy without expensive physical models or cadaver lab access. Existing digital solutions are static and non-interactive.

The Solution

An AR system that detects surfaces in real-time and overlays detailed anatomical models. Students tap any structure to receive a Gemini-powered natural language explanation instantly.

Key Features

01

Real-time Surface Detection

Uses ARKit/ARCore to anchor models precisely onto physical surfaces.

02

AI-Powered Explanations

Gemini API generates contextual explanations for any selected anatomical structure on demand.

03

Multi-Model Library

Complete library from skeletal to muscular and vascular systems.

04

Offline Mode

Core AR functionality works without internet; AI explanations queue for later delivery.

Tech Stack

Frontend

React NativeARKitARCore

AI / ML

Google Gemini APIOpenCV

Backend

PythonFastAPI

Infrastructure

GCP Cloud RunFirebase
